summary: Yt Mcp Pipeline component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「MCP 部署流水线 HUD」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-mcp-pipeline/src/YtMcpPipeline.tsx` and `remotion/yt-mcp-pipeline/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtMcpPipeline` and `ytMcpPipelineDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Mcp Pipeline Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-mcp-pipeline to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtMcpPipelineProps API and register the YtMcpPipeline composition with the default props.
